---
name: Glossary Term Suggestion
about: Propose adding a new term to a glossary
title: "[GLOSSARY] "
labels: glossary
assignees: ''
---

## Term

**English:** [English term]

**Proposed Ukrainian:** [Ukrainian translation]

**Alternates (if any):** [other acceptable forms, with context]

## Which glossary?

- [ ] `general.md` Section 7 (IT/SaaS)
- [ ] Domain supplement: ____________
- [ ] New subcategory needed: ____________

## Subcategory

If general IT/SaaS, which subsection of §7?

- [ ] 7.1 Authentication & Account
- [ ] 7.2 Core Product Actions
- [ ] 7.3 UI Elements
- [ ] 7.4 Subscriptions & Billing
- [ ] 7.5 Errors & States
- [ ] 7.6 Tech / Development
- [ ] 7.7 Data & Analytics
- [ ] 7.8 Communication / Collaboration

## Reasoning

Why this term, why this translation? Are there competing alternatives that should be mentioned in the notes column?

## Usage evidence

Where is this term used? (E.g., "Common in Ukrainian SaaS products like X, Y, Z" or "Standard term in Ukrainian dev community")

## Register

- [ ] Universal (works in any context)
- [ ] Operational/casual only
- [ ] Formal only
- [ ] Different translation per register (specify both)
